Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate Actions For Trial Related To Ptr-95-265730
Off Calendar Dec-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Determination
Off Calendar Dec-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 265730 Rev. Trust of Hilda E. Cole. and with case number 292761 The George H. Roe Family Trust.

Appearances: Thomas Latham for David Roe (Trustee).

Mr. Latham stated that he received a call from Michelle Trausch and an e-mail from Caroline Hinshaw with regard to a settlement being reached between Gregory Bogdan and Hilda Roe. In addition, he stated that he was informed by Ms. Hinshaw that Hilda wanted the agreement to be kept confidential, that he had not seen the stipulation/agreement and that he was not comfortable discussing other Counsels' positions. The three Declaratory Relief petitions were granted (subject to the written orders). The three Motions for Consolidation were granted without prejudice subject to David Roe's right to bifurcate or severe issues (subject to the written orders). All of the accountings were continued to January 11, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition For Instructions By Trustee For Distribution Of Trust Principal
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw and Richard Bryan for Hilda Roe. Michelle Trausch for Gregory Bogdon (Pettioner). Thomas Latham for David Roe.

Ms. Trausch stated that they reached an agreement to allow the Trustee to pay off in full the outstanding mortgage subject to certain conditions that are set forth in the petition and in the order, to authorize the Trustee to pay the expenses of final administration for the Shirley Roe Trust after payment of the mortgage and to allow the Trustee to distribute the balance of the trust assets to the Hilda Roe. The Parties agreed to continue all pending/remaining matters on calendar for the Shirley Roe Trust case number 267037, the Hilda Cole Trust case number 265730 and the George Roe Trust case number 292761 to November 16, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Maria Lertore, CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
